title: 諦め悪くて、ごめんなさい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Chasing after a budding racer was not my brightest idea. I've
completely lost sight of her... Her distressed expression still vivid in
my mind, I continue my search.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm completely backfired today. Between being late,
tripping during her run, and causing Opera O to have a near-death
experience...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried, I search the academy grounds. After what feels like half an
hour...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff, puff!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... I can do better... I will do better! For Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I have to run properly on the day of the race... Th-then... maybe
someday I'll... O-one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto wipes the tears from her puffy, reddened eyes and
makes a dash for the riverside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeaargh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Only to fall into a ditch.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That could've been bad... Thank you... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes... I'm, um... kinda used to falling at this point... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Why am I... like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her clothes are completely covered in mud, and it's already quite
late. Just as I'm about to urge her to return home, she raises her head.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... have to try harder! Yeah! Time for some long-distance running!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, I'm s-s-sorry! Is that a... problem?
choice_data_list: I'm just surprised by how hardworking you are.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: N-no, not at all! I'd say I'm more, um... stubborn than hardworking...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I think about quitting, I just start remembering... and I start
feeling like maybe... just maybe... even I can—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... It's not a very exciting story...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It happened a long time ago, when I went to see my first G1 race...
The racers, the crowd, the very race itself was just so... magical.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
At first, I thought of it all as a completely different world... One
where someone like me could never exist... until I heard the winner's
speech.

text_block_list.name: G1 Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I used to have no confidence in myself. I truly believed I could do
nothing right... But as I started winning races, I began to see myself in
a new light.

text_block_list.name: G1 Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Now, after winning such an amazing race, I can sincerely say that I
love myself!

text_block_list.name: Young Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Does... Does that mean that if I try hard enough, I can change too?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
After that, I got all excited and applied for Tracen Academy... And
somehow I got in. Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I-I know I'm a klutz, and nothing I do ever turns out right... But
I still have a hard time telling when it's time to give up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I keep hoping that if I keep trying, someday I'll be like that winner
back then... or maybe even a majestic racer like Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And before I knew it, it became even harder to give up... So not only
am I a klutz, I'm a stupid one at that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's already hard on herself by default, but she's even
worse today. It's clear she sees herself in a negative light, but...
choice_data_list: Isn't not giving up a good thing?
Isn't not giving up a good thing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today was an indisputable disaster, but even then, she's out here
preparing for the Tracen Meet. To me, that takes true grit.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? A g-good thing? S-s-sorry, I must've misheard you...
choice_data_list: I think tenacity's one of your strong points.
I think tenacity's one of your strong points.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I didn't mishear you?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
U-um... A-a-are you sure about that? I mean... all I'm doing is just
trudging along, not knowing when to give up...
choice_data_list: Not everyone can do that, you know.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not so sure about that...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe, I'm glad you think so, though...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, I, ummm... I think I'm going to run a little more before
going back to the dorm! H-have a good night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Meisho Doto runs off into the distance, I can feel a faint strength
coming from her unlike anything I've ever felt before.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Here I go!
